title: Everyone Is Coming
caption: The hearing date was set — thirty days to save thirty years of history. Chloe was on the phone, rallying the whole neighborhood. Rosie ran through the streets spreading the word at full sprint. Detective Park opened a file and prepared his 'tactical support.' At Marco's, plans were made for feeding everyone afterward, with Rosie lobbying shamelessly for the big cookies. And in the garden at golden hour, the community gathered: Mr. Chen kneeling in his beds, Dev beside him, Dev's grandmother standing with quiet dignity, Harriet arriving with her thick folder of archive documents, Father Bernard walking warm and steady at her side. At the edge of the garden, Gerald Hooper stood awkwardly in his too-tight suit, cap in hand, asking in a small voice whether he might be allowed to speak at the hearing. Everyone was coming.
location: Willowmere Community Garden, Marco's Bakery, and streets of the neighborhood
story_notes: The neighborhood mobilizes for the final public hearing after the heritage decision arrives with conditions.
